name: Yearn
description: By the legendary, 8-time New Zealand Champion Sire Savabeel, Yearn was a model of consistency and class throughout her career. A winner of 7 races, her crowning achievement was a victory in the Group 2 Auckland Thoroughbred Breeders' Stakes, coupled with an elite-level placing in the Group 1 Thorndon Mile. As a daughter of one of the greatest sires in Southern Hemisphere history, she brings the "Savabeel" brand of durability and classic performance that is highly coveted by investors and breeders alike.
